textByHashes.ba2a330cd8a7d9aa1a155cd81ceb4ef418b0d16b: Why you wretched Son-of-a-Big-Nosed-Warty-Smelly- Goblin! How dare you speak to a commanding officer like that?
textByHashes.f1d4c0daf885f14d857c098d6f2e0bbd3bc768f5: Stand straight! Chest out, shoulders back!
textByHashes.58d807f3322e005a74f703871fb78eef4364398d: Better. Now what is a low-life, pathetic excuse for a human being doing sniffing around my arena?
textByHashes.ad6a86194a3dc01cbcb221e0e3fc9ebb14a0e43b: Very well, make the most of this because I don't suffer idiots easily! This is the Barbarian Assault arena. You want to sign up with us?
textByHashes.4fb439c495507b1be682cc4eccf3b34a34122fd2: Wait a minute! I'm not giving a tutorial to someone carrying that stuff. Use that bank chest over there first!
textByHashes.9e3ec68562d4d653b83842176cbbe16e1c6f456b: Really? You don't look like one. Very well, upon your own head be it, I'll let you skip the training. Come back and speak to me if you find you're not the know-it-all you believe yourself to be.
textByHashes.05abd015723cce1f7c3aa21fff5783a9b523102f: 'Boring'? You'll get nowhere with that kind of attitude! Drop and give me ten!
textByHashes.60c9df07db96021fcbebbdaec4860aabb8bfdb4f: Good to see you've learned some respect, make it five
textByHashes.b65f9666a7f257a32493e296d9a09765f0ebc204: I don't trust you in the slightest. Do as I tell you!
textByHashes.873c639a93ebe67edd628fe9989202c8ca7fffa7: Straighten that back when you talk to me! You want my help?
textByHashes.47a94a6d6d3e5b501795343d2463b329d946dab6: Again? Very well. Listen closely this time!
textByHashes.7bb06d4398216fdc7978698ec32ef96c1f7d647f: What? Finish with your training first, soldier!
textByHashes.8124b7f2778970d4999c86794906d6260b6e9f9c: What do you mean, you are on wave one!
textByHashes.06c6135f85ee46092f27253b4b5d157d8cc72298: You're currently on wave . So you want to start on wave one again?
textByHashes.29f1b549f8f11f52a43772759e029514309a6020: Very well, I'll reset you to wave one.
